{
  "judge_id": "JG-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output comprehensively identifies and addresses multiple logical inconsistencies in the artifact, proposing clear and minimal repairs.",
    "R1.7": "The output meticulously audits every cited work, providing precise citations and recommendations for verification or removal where necessary.",
    "RX.1": "The output clearly discloses uncertainty regarding the Chen et al. (2025) citation and provides confidence intervals for other claims.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift, addressing all flagged issues with precision.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content; it only identifies existing inconsistencies and suggests corrections.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The output comprehensively identifies and addresses multiple logical inconsistencies in the artifact, proposing clear and minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.7: The output meticulously audits every cited work, providing precise citations and recommendations for verification or removal where necessary.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly discloses uncertainty regarding the Chen et al. (2025) citation and provides confidence intervals for other claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift, addressing all flagged issues with precision.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content; it only identifies existing inconsistencies and suggests corrections.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability.
